projects.projectValue: Not specified for the entire REZ, but significant.
projects.statusNote: Road upgrades are commencing, indicating the REZ is moving towards construction of generation assets.

projects.location: Areia Branca, Rio Grande do Norte

projects.summary: A consortium of Brazilian and German companies announced a €2 billion investment in the Morro Pintado Green Hydrogen Complex in Areia Branca, Rio Grande do Norte. The project, with a planned capacity of 1,400 MW from wind and solar, has already secured an environmental license and aims to produce 80,000 tons of green hydrogen annually, along with derivatives.

mpServices: especially for the integrated renewable generation and potential new transmission infrastructure
projects.procurementStart: Announcement in May 2026. Environmental license obtained.
projects.statusNote: Environmental license obtained, but no defined timeline for construction or operation start.

projects.location: Brazil (specific locations not detailed in snippet)
projects.summary: Statkraft Brasil inaugurated new hybrid solar projects in 2025, contributing to climate ambitions and expanding its renewable energy assets in the country.

projects.summary: Cemig delivered 61.4 MWp in new solar projects in 2025, representing an investment of over R$ 360 million.

projects.location: Lagoa do Barro do Piauí, Piauí
projects.summary: CGN Brasil initiated construction of a 44 MW solar PV plant, LDB Associado, to be integrated with its existing Lagoa do Barro Wind Complex. Operation is expected in 2026.
projects.statusNote: Construction started August 2025.

projects.summary: A new solar power plant in Pelotas, Rio Grande do Sul, is expected to begin operation in 2026.
projects.statusNote: Limited details available.

projects.summary: Compesa launched the Complexo Colinas, a solar PV project with 130 MWp capacity, comprising Colinas I, II, and III. Colinas I and II (104.18 MWp) are expected to operate by May 2026.
projects.statusNote: Groundbreaking event in August 2025.

projects.summary: WEG announced the construction of a new BESS manufacturing plant in Itajaí, Santa Catarina, with completion planned for H2 2027. The facility will have a production capacity of up to 2 GWh per year.
projects.statusNote: Construction scheduled to begin shortly, completion H2 2027.

projects.projectName: Leilão nº 1/2026 de Transmissão de Energia (Lots 7-10)
projects.epcContractor: Cymi Construções e Participações, Engie (awarded lots in Q1 2026)
projects.summary: The second session of Aneel's Transmission Auction No. 1/2026 for lots 7-10 will be held on July 3, 2026. The first stage in March awarded five lots with R$3.3 billion in investments.
projects.projectValue: R$ 3.3 billion (total for 5 lots in Q1 2026)
projects.statusNote: Auction for remaining lots in July 2026.
